name: polymath-connector-tracker
description: Issue-tracker connector: Jira + Linear MCP servers, ticket-key detection hooks, and triage / file-bug-from-incident skills. Supply credentials for whichever tracker you use.

jiraUrl.title: Jira base URL
jiraUrl.description: Jira Cloud base URL (e.g. https://example.atlassian.net). Supply the jira* keys only if you use Jira.

jiraEmail.title: Atlassian email
jiraEmail.description: Email associated with the Atlassian account (Jira only).

jiraApiToken.title: Atlassian API token
jiraApiToken.description: API token from id.atlassian.com → Security → API tokens (Jira only).

linearApiKey.title: Linear API key
linearApiKey.description: Personal API key from Linear Settings → API (Linear only). Prefer a service-account key where Linear supports it.
